title: Timeline
description: Maintain detailed timeline for demo: hardware procurement lead times (T-Echo 8-12 weeks?), firmware feature gates (phase 4-6 complete by Q3), integration testing (sim 500-node by Aug), visualization rollout, test scenarios validation, conference dry-run. Update epic links only. Link to procurement and test beads.
close_reason: Fixed per query: D3.js viz implemented in dashboard with CoAP gateway backend for topology/spectrum/stats/live-mesh/packet-flow/GPS; planning tasks created/updated in bd for timeline/test-scenarios/T-Echo(vendors,pricing,jigs); epic updated with links only; 3 codereview passes; pytest run; no throwaway files.
